'''竏喇-dh-s-k''' ('''kahadhsekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jawl|jawl]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-dh-s-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jawl|jawl]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喇-dh-s-k
|-
! Lemma
| kahadhsekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihadhsekoko|thihadhsekoko]] || [[word:jihadhsekoko|jihadhsekoko]] || [[word:shihadhsekoko|shihadhsekoko]] || [[word:kihadhsekoko|kihadhsekoko]]
